sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Block at rows 8-12, cols 20-24. RIGHT x3 to reach cols 38-42.
# Then check if level completes.
result = action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
print(f"After RIGHT x3: step={current_frame.step}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")

hud_blue = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63 and n['pixels'] > 10]
hud_gray = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'w' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 63]
print(f"HUD blue: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_blue]}")
print(f"HUD gray: {[(n['pixels']) for n in hud_gray]}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
else:
    print("Level not complete. Try DOWN to follow vertical path...")
    result = action(['DOWN'])
    print(f"After DOWN: step={current_frame.step}")
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
    print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")
    
    # Try DOWN again
    result = action(['DOWN'])
    print(f"After DOWN 2: step={current_frame.step}")
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
    print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")
    
    # Try LEFT along red path
    result = action(['LEFT'])
    print(f"After LEFT: step={current_frame.step}")
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    blue_block = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
    print(f"Blue block: {[(n['boundary']) for n in blue_block]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
